data/text/magma_summit.inc.MtPyre_Summit_Text_1B5CFD: I'll show you exactly how scary\nTEAM MAGMA can be!
data/text/magma_summit.inc.MtPyre_Summit_Text_1B5D30: So you think you can stand up alone\nto TEAM MAGMA's might...
data/text/magma_summit.inc.MtPyre_Summit_Text_1B5D6D: Yeah, so you are strong...\nBut there're a lot of us!
data/text/magma_summit.inc.MtPyre_Summit_Text_1B5DA2: What's up with you?\nWhat does a single kid expect to do?
data/text/magma_summit.inc.MtPyre_Summit_Text_1B5DF1: You don't know anything.\nQuit messing around with us!
data/text/magma_summit.inc.MtPyre_Summit_Text_1B5E27: Hey, I remember you from MT. CHIMNEY!\nIt's payback time!
data/text/magma_summit.inc.MtPyre_Summit_Text_1B5E84: Heh, it doesn't matter!\nWe bought ourselves some time!\pThe BOSS should have snatched what\nhe was after!
data/text/magma_summit.inc.MtPyre_Summit_Text_1B5EEC:
MAXIE: Not you again...\pYou've impeded our plans repeatedly,
but this time you're too late.\pThe BLUE ORB that rested atop
MT. PYRE...\lI, MAXIE, claim it as mine!\pFufufu... Finally, I can realize my
grand design...\pCome on, crew!
It's SLATEPORT next!
data/text/magma_summit.inc.MtPyre_Summit_Text_1B5FE6:
Oh, no...
This cannot happen...\pHow could they take the BLUE ORB?\pThe BLUE ORB and RED ORB must never
be separated. They belong together.\p... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...
Hmm...\pFine!
You take the remaining RED ORB.\pPlease take after that foul man and
get the other ORB back!
data/text/magma_summit.inc.MtPyre_Summit_Text_1B60F9: The RED ORB you have been entrusted\nwith and the stolen BLUE ORB...\pThey must never be apart...\nSomething terrible will happen...
data/text/magma_summit.inc.MtPyre_Summit_Text_1B617B:
So...
GROUDON has awoken...\pThe wondrous ORB that is said to have
becalmed the raging GROUDON...\lIt is the RED ORB you bear.\pThat RED ORB was found buried inside
the CAVE OF ORIGIN in SOOTOPOLIS...\pThere is perhaps a link between
GROUDON and the CAVE OF ORIGIN...
data/text/magma_summit.inc.MtPyre_Summit_Text_1B6283: That man, he returned the BLUE ORB.\pAre you going to return the RED ORB\nto its rightful place, too?
data/text/magma_summit.inc.MtPyre_Summit_Text_1B62E7: What's that?!\pIf the balance is not restored, there\nis no telling what could happen.\pYou will return the RED ORB to its\nrightful place, yes?
data/text/magma_summit.inc.UnknownString_81B6374: {PLAYER} handed the RED ORB to the\nold woman.
data/text/magma_summit.inc.MtPyre_Summit_Text_1B639C: Yes...\nThe two ORBS should remain here.\pIt is how it should be for the good\nof all HOENN...
data/text/magma_summit.inc.MtPyre_Summit_Text_1B63F8: The spirit of the land...\pThat is what GROUDON is said to be in\nPOKéMON form...\pIn the same manner that we and POKéMON\nhave life, this very land is alive...\pGROUDON has taught us that...
data/text/magma_summit.inc.MtPyre_Summit_Text_1B64B3:
MT. PYRE is where we calm the spirits
of POKéMON that have passed on...\pThis is a high place where one can
see all of HOENN...\pThe disembodied spirits of POKéMON
must find solace here...\pIs it coincidence that you are here...\pWill you hear out my tale? A tale long
told in the HOENN region?
data/text/magma_summit.inc.MtPyre_Summit_Text_1B65D6:
It happened long, long ago...\pThe world was wracked by a ferocious
clash between the POKéMON of the land\land the POKéMON of the sea...\pThe POKéMON of the land raised
mountains and created continents...\pThe POKéMON of the sea raised huge
waves and carved out oceans...\pTheir fierce duel raged without end.\pThe world was engulfed in vicious
storms and massive infernos.\pThe RED ORB and the BLUE ORB brought
an end to the calamity.\pLight poured from the two ORBS and
becalmed the enraged adversaries.\pThe pair, made docile, burrowed deep
under the ground where eventually\lthey disappeared...
data/text/magma_summit.inc.MtPyre_Summit_Text_1B6823: I see...\nWell, that, too, is fine...
data/text/magma_summit.inc.MtPyre_Summit_Text_1B6848:
MAXIE: You...
So you stopped GROUDON...\pI shouldn't be surprised...\pI understand now that humans cannot
freely control the balance between\lthe land and the sea...\pSo I have come to return the
BLUE ORB...\pI doubt that we will cross paths again...
Farewell...
